raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Social housing programs, inspired by successful models in Europe and Asia, can significantly address the housing crisis in California.",
    "In Vienna, 62% of citizens reside in public social housing.",
    "In Singapore, 87% of citizens reside in public social housing.",
    "The mortgages offered by Singapore’s Housing and Development Board (HDB) have monthly payments that are significantly lower than private rents.",
    "The homeownership rate in Singapore's HDB properties is 91% despite severe land constraints.",
    "California has experienced an extended and increasing housing shortage for nearly 50 years.",
    "In 2018, California ranked 49th among the United States in housing units per resident.",
    "More than four in ten households in California had unaffordable housing costs, as defined by exceeding 30 percent of household income."
  ]
}
```
